{{Quote|He is an unkind and rough man, and he is easily angered.|[[Derembus Sitnalta]] on Clenna|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Clenna''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] and later a drill sergeant for the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].

==Biography==
Raised on industrial world of [[Yalln]], the young Clenna scouted unsettled terrains with his pet [[Tal (creature)|tal]].<ref name="AIR" />

He lated joined the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], wanting to become a drill instructor. He never managed to get the coveted job, but he nevertheless learned much, specially theory. Although the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] propaganda never brainwashed him, he nevertheless despised the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="AIR" />

During Clenna's service at [[Ruac Outpost]], he met and served with [[Derembus Sitnalta]].<ref name="AIR" />

Suddenly too old for the Empire, he returned to Yalln, but soon he grew restless.<ref name="AIR" />

Trying to change his life, he joined the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] as a means to "bark orders to impressionable recruits". He was instructed there by GOSS dean [[Barosa Warren]], which increased Clenna's skill.<ref name="AIR" />

Due to his loyalty to Warren, and due to Warren being enemy of certain Rebel officers, the Rebel Alliance considered Clenna a threat. His former acquaintance Sitnalta, who was a Rebel soldier as of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], wrote a report on Clenna explaining that age had taken its toll on Clenna, but he was still dangerous because of his resources at GOSS.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
